_NOTE: TEMPORARY SAMPLE DATA — used as fallback when the database is unavailable (SQLite schema mismatch / Aurora not yet connected). Remove this fallback once the real DB is working and Aurora is reconnected. See backend/.env for the commented-out Aurora DATABASE_URL.

alerts.summary: Switch this order to Dhaka Garments Ltd (Bangladesh) and confirm the 8-week lead time against your delivery deadline before placing the order.
US imposes 46% tariff on Vietnamese textiles. Evaluate alternate suppliers in Bangladesh or India to maintain delivery schedule.

disruptions.title: US imposes 46% tariff on Vietnamese textile exports
disruptions.description: The US announced a 46% tariff on textile and apparel imports from Vietnam effective immediately. Importers sourcing HS 61xx/62xx goods from Vietnamese manufacturers face significant cost increases on all pending orders.

disruptions.title: 25% tariff on Chinese steel products extended through 2027
disruptions.description: Section 232 tariffs on Chinese steel (HS 72xx/73xx) have been extended. Buyers relying on Chinese steel suppliers for construction or manufacturing should expect sustained cost pressure.
